example  
another example  

the frame of the bike has a base weight of w kilograms. each advanced component added to the frame reduces the weight by 2%. if alex adds n advanced components, the final weight of the frame, w_f, is w - 2% * n.  

alex aims to achieve a total reduction of energy expenditure by 25%. the reduction in energy expenditure, e, is modeled by the function e(n) = 1 - (1 - 0.02)^n. to meet the desired energy expenditure reduction, alex should add at least 10 advanced components. the word clock should appear at least 3 times.
